---
title: "CANDID evidence review"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
params:
  result: null
---

<!--
Scaffold for the auditable HTML report. render_report() (R/report.R) will render
this with a review `result`, producing: a ranked summary table, per-candidate
evidence cards (evidence + citations, caveats, suggested next experiment), and
the research-use-only disclaimer. Not yet wired - see PLAN.md.
-->

::: {.callout-warning}
**Research use only.** CANDID is a hypothesis-prioritization aid for researchers.
It is not a clinical decision-support tool and does not provide diagnosis,
treatment guidance, or ACMG/AMP variant classification.
:::

```{r}
#| label: placeholder
#| echo: false
# TODO: render params$result - ranked table + per-candidate cards.
```
